chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 270 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 28-04-2022 Petitioner Abdul Shakoor, present in person. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Petition, the Petitioner has sought the following relief(s): a. To declare the act of respondents not issuing FORM-15 of revenue record of survey No. 140, 271 Deh Arab Machi Taluka Kotdiji District Khairpur is illegal, unlawful in the eye of law. b. To declare posting of Assistant Commissioner Kotdiji Muhammad Asim Abbasi in Taluka Kotdiji is illegal, unlawful because his village is same and Taluka is same. c. That this Hon’ble Court may kindly be pleased to order to Assistant Commissioner Kotdiji issue certified true copy of FORM-15 of revenue record Deh Arab Machi survey No. 140, 271. d. Any other relief which this Hon’ble Court may deems fit & proper. Today, comments have been filed on behalf of Respondents No.2 & 4, and it has been stated that the true copy which is being prayed for by the Petitioner is not available in the official record of the Respondents, hence, the relief cannot be granted. In view of such position, since a disputed fact has been raised, we cannot exercise the Constitutional jurisdiction and accordingly the Petition is dismissed; whereas, the Petitioner is at liberty to avail appropriate civil remedy as may be available under the law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
